author: untarz
title: QQ群聊消息分析
description: 手动触发的当前群聊消息分析插件，读取当前会话最近消息并生成统计、话题、金句、用户风格和聊天质量报告。

permissions.title: Read current conversation history
permissions.description: Allows the plugin to read recent messages from the current conversation for manual analysis.

permissions.title: Read available LLM providers
permissions.description: Allows the plugin to select a configured provider and model when settings are not specified.

permissions.title: Call LLM
permissions.description: Allows the plugin to call the configured LLM to generate analysis reports.

entrySummary: 在当前群使用 /群分析-帮助，基于最近最多 100 条消息生成群聊分析。
